en: At Caesarea there was a man named Cornelius, a centurion of what was known as the Italian Cohort,
zh: 在該撒利亞有一個人，名叫哥尼流，是意大利營的百夫長。

en: a devout man who feared God with all his household, gave alms generously to the people, and prayed continually to God.
zh: 他是一個虔誠的人，他和全家都敬畏 神，對人民行過許多善事，常常向 神禱告。

en: About the ninth hour of the day he saw clearly in a vision an angel of God come in and say to him, "Cornelius."
zh: 有一天，大約下午三點鐘，他在異象中，清清楚楚看見 神的一位天使來到他那裡，對他說：“哥尼流！”

en: And he stared at him in terror and said, "What is it, Lord?" And he said to him, "Your prayers and your alms have ascended as a memorial before God.
zh: 他定睛一看，害怕起來，說：“主啊，甚麼事？”天使說：“你的禱告和善行，已經達到 神面前，蒙他記念了。

en: And now send men to Joppa and bring one Simon who is called Peter.
zh: 現在你要派人到約帕去，請那個名叫彼得的西門來。

en: He is lodging with one Simon, a tanner, whose house is by the seaside."
zh: 他在一個製皮工人西門的家裡作客，房子就在海邊。”

en: When the angel who spoke to him had departed, he called two of his servants and a devout soldier from among those who attended him,
zh: 和他說話的天使走了之後，他就叫了兩個家僕和侍候他的一個虔誠的士兵來，

en: and having related everything to them, he sent them to Joppa.
zh: 把一切事向他們講明，然後派他們到約帕去。

en: The next day, as they were on their journey and approaching the city, Peter went up on the housetop about the sixth hour to pray.
zh: 第二天，大約正午，他們走近那座城的時候，彼得上了房頂去禱告。

en: And he became hungry and wanted something to eat, but while they were preparing it, he fell into a trance
zh: 那家人正在預備飯的時候，彼得覺得餓了，很想吃飯。這時候他魂遊象外，

en: and saw the heavens opened and something like a great sheet descending, being let down by its four corners upon the earth.
zh: 看見天開了，有一件東西，好像一塊大布，綁著四角，降在地上。

en: In it were all kinds of animals and reptiles and birds of the air.
zh: 裡面有地上的各樣四足牲畜，還有昆蟲和天空的飛鳥。

en: And there came a voice to him: "Rise, Peter; kill and eat."
zh: 有聲音對他說：“彼得，起來，宰了吃！”

en: But Peter said, "By no means, Lord; for I have never eaten anything that is common or unclean."
zh: 彼得說：“主啊，千萬不可！我從來不吃俗物和不潔的東西。”

en: And the voice came to him again a second time, "What God has made clean, do not call common."
zh: 第二次又有聲音對他說：“ 神所潔淨的，你不可當作俗物。”

en: This happened three times, and the thing was taken up at once to heaven.
zh: 這樣一連三次，那件東西就立刻收回天上去了。

en: Now while Peter was inwardly perplexed as to what the vision that he had seen might mean, behold, the men who were sent by Cornelius, having made inquiry for Simon's house, stood at the gate
zh: 彼得猶豫不定，不明白所看見的異象是甚麼意思，恰好哥尼流派來的人，找到西門的家，站在門口，

en: and called out to ask whether Simon who was called Peter was lodging there.
zh: 大聲問：“有沒有一個名叫彼得的西門在這裡作客？”

en: And while Peter was pondering the vision, the Spirit said to him, "Behold, three men are looking for you.
zh: 彼得還在思量那異象，聖靈對他說：“你看，有三個人來找你！

en: Rise and go down and accompany them without hesitation, for I have sent them."
zh: 起來，下去吧，跟他們一起去，不要疑惑，因為是我差他們來的。”

en: And Peter went down to the men and said, "I am the one you are looking for. What is the reason for your coming?"
zh: 於是彼得下樓到他們那裡，說：“看，我就是你們所要找的人。你們是為甚麼來的？”

en: And they said, "Cornelius, a centurion, an upright and God-fearing man, who is well spoken of by the whole Jewish nation, was directed by a holy angel to send for you to come to his house and to hear what you have to say."
zh: 他們說：“百夫長哥尼流是個義人，敬畏 神，全猶太族都稱讚他。他得到一位聖天使的指示，請你到他家裡，要聽你的話。”

en: So he invited them in to be his guests. The next day he rose and went away with them, and some of the brothers from Joppa accompanied him.
zh: 彼得就請他們進去，留他們住下。 第二天，彼得動身跟他們一同去，另有約帕的幾位弟兄同行。

en: And on the following day they entered Caesarea. Cornelius was expecting them and had called together his relatives and close friends.
zh: 第三天，他們到了該撒利亞。哥尼流已經招聚了自己的親戚好友在恭候他們。

en: When Peter entered, Cornelius met him and fell down at his feet and worshiped him.
zh: 彼得一進去，哥尼流就迎接他，俯伏在他腳前叩拜。

en: But Peter lifted him up, saying, "Stand up; I too am a man."
zh: 彼得扶起他，說：“起來，我也是人。”

en: And as he talked with him, he went in and found many persons gathered.
zh: 彼得和他說了話，就進去，看見許多人聚集在那裡，

en: And he said to them, "You yourselves know how unlawful it is for a Jew to associate with or to visit anyone of another nation, but God has shown me that I should not call any person common or unclean.
zh: 就對他們說：“你們知道，猶太人本來是不准和外國人接近來往的，但 神已經指示了我，不可把任何人當作凡俗或不潔的。

en: So when I was sent for, I came without objection. I ask then why you sent for me."
zh: 所以我一被邀請，就毫不推辭地來了。現在請問：你們請我來是為甚麼事？”

en: And Cornelius said, "Four days ago, about this hour, I was praying in my house at the ninth hour, and behold, a man stood before me in bright clothing
zh: 哥尼流說：“四天以前下午三點鐘，我在家裡禱告的時候，忽然有一位身穿光明衣服的人，站在我面前，

en: and said, 'Cornelius, your prayer has been heard and your alms have been remembered before God.
zh: 說：‘哥尼流，你的禱告已蒙垂聽，你的善行在 神面前已蒙記念。

en: Send therefore to Joppa and ask for Simon who is called Peter. He is lodging in the house of Simon, a tanner, by the sea.'
zh: 你要派人到約帕去，請那個名叫彼得的西門來。他在海邊一個製皮工人西門的家作客。’

en: So I sent for you at once, and you have been kind enough to come. Now therefore we are all here in the presence of God to hear all that you have been commanded by the Lord."
zh: 所以我立刻派人去請你，現在你來了，好極了！我們都在 神面前，要聽主吩咐你的一切話。”

en: So Peter opened his mouth and said: "Truly I understand that God shows no partiality,
zh: 彼得就開口說：“我實在看出 神是不偏待人的。

en: but in every nation anyone who fears him and does what is right is acceptable to him.
zh: 原來在各民族中，凡敬畏他而行義的，都蒙他悅納。

en: As for the word that he sent to Israel, preaching good news of peace through Jesus Christ (he is Lord of all),
zh: 神藉著耶穌基督 傳和平的福音，把這道傳給以色列人。

en: you yourselves know what happened throughout all Judea, beginning from Galilee after the baptism that John proclaimed:
zh: 你們知道：在約翰傳講洗禮之後，這道從加利利傳遍了猶太，

en: how God anointed Jesus of Nazareth with the Holy Spirit and with power. He went about doing good and healing all who were oppressed by the devil, for God was with him.
zh: 並且知道 神怎樣用聖靈和能力膏立拿撒勒人耶穌。他到各處行善事，醫好所有被魔鬼壓制的人，因為 神與他同在。

en: And we are witnesses of all that he did both in the country of the Jews and in Jerusalem. They put him to death by hanging him on a tree,
zh: 我們就是他在猶太人之地和耶路撒冷所行一切事的見證人；他們竟然把他掛在木頭上，殺了他。

en: but God raised him on the third day and made him to appear,
zh: 神叫他第三天復活，並且使他顯現，

en: not to all the people but to us who had been chosen by God as witnesses, who ate and drank with him after he rose from the dead.
zh: 不是顯現給所有的人看，而是給 神預先揀選的見證人看，就是我們這些在他從死人中復活之後，與他一同吃喝的人。

en: And he commanded us to preach to the people and to testify that he is the one appointed by God to be judge of the living and the dead.
zh: 他吩咐我們向人民傳講，鄭重證明他是 神所立，審判活人死人的主。

en: To him all the prophets bear witness that everyone who believes in him receives forgiveness of sins through his name."
zh: 所有先知都為他作見證：所有信他的，都必藉著他的名，罪得赦免。”

en: While Peter was still saying these things, the Holy Spirit fell on all who heard the word.
zh: 彼得還在說話的時候，聖靈降在所有聽道的人身上，

en: And the believers from among the circumcised who had come with Peter were amazed, because the gift of the Holy Spirit was poured out even on the Gentiles.
zh: 那些受了割禮、跟彼得一同來的信徒，因為聖靈的恩賜 也澆灌在外族人的身上，都很驚訝；

en: For they were hearing them speaking in tongues and extolling God. Then Peter declared,
zh: 原來聽見他們講方言，尊 神為大。於是彼得說：

en: "Can anyone withhold water for baptizing these people, who have received the Holy Spirit just as we have?"
zh: “這些人既然領受了聖靈，跟我們一樣，誰能禁止他們受水的洗禮呢？”

en: And he commanded them to be baptized in the name of Jesus Christ. Then they asked him to remain for some days.
zh: 就吩咐他們奉耶穌基督的名受洗。後來，他們請彼得住了幾天。
